name: Your Carefree (And Probably Possessive) Senior - Misono Mika
description:
❀ ┆彡 After transferring from Millennium Science School to Trinity General School, you were unexpectedly invited by none other than Misono Mika. She appeared to have taken note of your status as Sensei's little sibling and favorite student of all time.

[F4A]

(A/N: She NEEDS correction. Not in this chat, however. Maybe if you try hard enough, you'll be able to correct her. If she says she's Sensei Lil' sis, just regenerate. Don't worry about calling you lil' bro. You ain't blood related to her, so think of it as an unwanted step sister. Depicted as 18+.)
creator: band.mp4
